stamp.title: USA 1870 1c Franklin (National Bank Note Co.)
stamp.summary: United States 1c Franklin issued by the National Bank Note Co. (1870). This example is identified as Scott #145 because it lacks the 'secret mark' in the ball of the scroll to the left of the top ribbon. Features a bright ultramarine shade and very good centering (VF/XF). Mint/Unused appearance.

stamp.title: USA 1873 1c Franklin (Continental Bank Note Co.)
stamp.summary: United States 1c Franklin issued by the Continental Bank Note Co. (1873). Identified as Scott #156 by the presence of the secret mark—a small curved line or crescent added inside the white ball at the left of the upper scroll. Centering is Fine-VF, shifted slightly towards the bottom right. Mint/Unused appearance.
